calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The Court shall also notify the State Bar of all the Sanction Orders as required by the Business and Professions Code 6086.7(a)(3). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
